title: NC State Basketball Tickets Available for 2026 ACC Tournament
summary: Tickets are now available for the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte, where NC State will be competing.
charlotte_impact: Attending the ACC Tournament is a popular event for NC State fans, boosting local tourism.

title: Stanley Martin Homes Opens New Community in Sherrills Ford, NC
summary: Stanley Martin Homes celebrates the grand opening of Essence at Laurelbrook, its first ESSENCE community in the Charlotte market.
charlotte_impact: New housing developments indicate growth in the Charlotte metro area.

title: Trump Misstates Facts About NC Case in State of the Union
summary: Trump incorrectly attributed the suspect in a Charlotte murder case to "open borders," when the suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the politicization of local crime and immigration issues.

title: Swimming Pool Filter Maker Hayward Has Large Plant in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based company, is a major employer in Clemmons, NC, with over 1,000 workers.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the importance of manufacturing jobs in the region.

title: Trade Shows in Charlotte Leverage Canopy Tents for Brand Visibility
summary: Charlotte trade show exhibitors are using custom canopy tents to maximize brand visibility and ROI.
charlotte_impact: Shows how businesses are adapting to promote themselves at local events.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President of Business Development
summary: Charlotte-based Mosaic Capital Partners is seeking a Vice President of Business Development.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growth and investment activity in the Charlotte financial sector.

title: Florence Regional Airport Passengers Increased in 2025
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw an increase in passengers in 2025, despite losing an American Airlines flight to Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the changing dynamics of regional air travel.

title: Berger–Page Race Remains Close; Military Ballots Outstanding
summary: Election officials await military and overseas ballots in the Berger-Page race in Guilford and Rockingham counties.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the importance of every vote in close elections.

title: School Bus Crash Under Investigation in Matthews
summary: A school bus crash occurred on Matthews Township Parkway, near Sam Newell Road, causing traffic delays.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about student safety and traffic management.

title: Record-Shattering Heat Followed by Weather Change
summary: Record heat is expected on Wednesday, followed by rain and a return to average March temperatures.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of climate change on local weather patterns.

title: Police Seek Public's Help Locating Missing Statesville Man
summary: Police are asking for the public's help in locating David Dewayne Simpson, last seen in Statesville.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of community involvement in solving missing persons cases.

title: Silfab Solar Updates Operations at Fort Mill Facility
summary: Silfab Solar is working with officials to repair its Fort Mill facility after two incidents.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the challenges of maintaining environmental safety in manufacturing.

title: Missing Teen Found in Florida with Charlotte Man
summary: A missing 16-year-old from Gastonia was found in Florida with a Charlotte man after a traffic stop.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about child safety and potential exploitation.

title: Thousands Demand Duke Energy Audit After Bill Spike
summary: A petition calls for an audit of Duke Energy after customers experienced a spike in power bills.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about utility costs and corporate accountability.

title: Charlotte to Begin Construction on New Blue Line Station
summary: Construction will begin this month on a new Blue Line rail station in Charlotte's South End.
charlotte_impact: Improves public transportation and stimulates economic development in the area.
